F16 Words in rule 31.3(3) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 18(5)(c) (with reg. 26 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(e) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


### Application for registration, recognition or non-recognition of a judgment E+W


31.4. —(1) Any interested person may apply to the court for an order that the judgment be registered, recognised or not recognised.


(2) [ F17 An ] application for registration, recognition or non-recognition must be —


Textual Amendments


F17 Word in rule 31.4(2) substituted (31.12.2020) by The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 18(6) (with reg. 26 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(e) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


### Documents – supplementary E+W


31.5. —(1) [ F18 Where ] the person making an application under this Part does not produce the documents required by rule 31.4(2)(b) the court may —
